title: Tetrion White All Purpose Filler 1kg
features: CONVENIENT READY MIX: Tetrion's filler is ready mixed for effortless use on plaster, wood, or walls Say goodbye to the hassle of mixing and make repairs easier than ever!
LONG-LASTING DURABILITY: Crafted to provide strong and flexible fillings, this solution is ideal for various surfaces Enjoy reliable repairs that stand the test of time
MULTI-PURPOSE USE: ideal for filling cracks, holes, or imidealions in diverse materials Whether it's wood or plaster, achieve a flawless finish with our filler
SIMPLE APPLICATION: The ready mixed formula eliminates guesswork, ensuring a smooth and easy application process Save time on your home improvement projects!
ADAPTABLE REPAIRS: Suitable for both indoor and outdoor projects, Tetrion's filler is a vital addition to your DIY toolkit Achieve professional results with versatility and ease
description: Product Description The Tetrion brand is one of the most recognisable names within the professional trade market over the last 40+ years. At its launch in the early 1970’s Tetrion changed the filler market with the innovation of the first ‘All Purpose Filler’. With Fillers, Adhesives, Decorating Sundries, and much more, Tetrion covers every aspect of modern household decorating, attracting new tradespeople and DIY enthusiasts with its reputation as one of, if not the best homecare range on the market. Tetrion All Purpose Filler Ready Mixed 1Kg Tetrion All Purpose Ready Mixed Filler is our most versatile ready mixed filler. Suitable for interior and exterior repairs, Tetrion All Purpose Ready Mixed Filler seals and fills most household materials including plaster, wood, stone, concrete, brickwork, and metal. Water and weather resistant (when overpainted with oil-based paint when fully set) Drillable, tappable, and over-paintable Resistant to vibration, shrinking, sagging, and cracking Resilient to expansion and contraction Highly versatile - suitable for multiple surface applications Ready mixed for convenience for quick repair jobs - no dosing or mixed required Super smooth, easy and quick to sand High strength polymer re-enforced Ready to seal and fill most household materials including plaster, wood, stone, concrete, and brickwork High strength formulation, once set it can be drilled, painted, plugged, grinded, etc. Highly versatile, resistant to vibration, shrinking, sagging and cracking, for use inside and out Ready to use mixed for convenience for quick repair jobs Directions for use: 1. Ensure all surfaces are dry, clean and free from loose material 2. If required, stir before use and add a few drops of water to improve workability 3. Apply with a filling knife and smooth off immediately with a wet blade 4. Setting occurs in approximately 4-6 hours depending on depth of fill and atmospheric conditions. After 24 hours filler can be sanded and then overpainted with most household paints 5. Over paint with an oil-based paint when used externally. prime with a suitable sealer when overpainting with a water-based paint After use: Replace plastic disc and lid to ensure remaining filler stays in good condition. Advice: Tetrion All Purpose Ready Mix Filler should be applied in layers of no less than 3mm and no greater than 10mm to ensure adhesion. Tetrion All Purpose Ready Mix Filler can be drilled or tapped provided that the depth of the set filler is at least equal to that of the screw/plug. Under long term storage, product may separate slightly, if this is the case, stir before use. Important: Do not use in wet or damp conditions or use on surfaces regularly underwater. Do not sandwich between layers of paint and/or sealants.
